texto: Live in the present. Don't think about things that aren't happening. Definitely don't think about eating cheeseburgers when you're not eating cheeseburgers. First of all, it's not happening. Second of all, it'll just make you hungry.
explicacao: Citação de Amber heart sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Live in the present. Don't think about things that aren't happening. Definitely don't think about…” articula reflexao, humor, present em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como present.
